name: Pathmark Local App Windows
release: v0.6.98 Organisation Finance Nutrition and robust Tasklist fallback
label: Organisation Finance Nutrition and robust Tasklist fallback
release_notes: Renames the hosted work areas to Organisation, Finance and Nutrition, removes seasonal banners from working modules, quietens the account bar, and adds a deeper Tasklist fallback so the section remains usable when grouped rendering fails.
notes: Top-level hosted modules now use broader names: Organisation, Finance and Nutrition.
Home keeps the seasonal banner and cleaner wordmark-led branding, while working modules remove the banner so the page starts with the task context.
The signed-in/access controls have been made visually quieter so they do not dominate the working pages.
Tasklist rendering now has a deeper fallback path: if grouped tasklist rendering fails, Pathmark shows a simple selector instead of closing the whole section.
Printable tasklist downloads fall back to a text file if PDF generation fails, so the section remains usable.
release_name: Organisation Finance Nutrition and robust Tasklist fallback
